title: Copper, Rose Gold and Steel
description: Mod adding Steel, Rosegold and Copper Tools
body:
Its simple mod adding Copper, Rose Gold and Steel related items. The mod is part of modpack but can be used standalone.

- **Copper Tools** - Stone Level but little faster
- **Rose Gold** - Iron level with speed of Gold items
- **Steel** - Diamond Level but slighty better

Tools harvest levels can be modified easily by using datapacks.

Rose Gold and Steel is now Trim Materials
